compositional_truth_check.details: P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/bare soil. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/bare soil. P3 (Pothos) is present with anchor. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent/bare soil.

plant_audit.P3_Pothos: The specimen shows a single, chlorotic leaf with a thin, etiolated petiole. The plant is in a state of severe physiological stress, likely due to light starvation and substrate depletion.
plant_audit.P1_P2_P4: These pots are currently devoid of viable plant matter, containing only soil and debris.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Substrate appears dry and compacted across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments are present in P3, likely an attempt at calcium supplementation. A small, black, multi-legged object (resembling a plastic comb or structural component) has appeared in the CURRENT image near the pots.

temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: Introduction of a paper receipt/document near the yellow pot.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Significant loss of ambient light; scene appears underexposed.
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Return of light; introduction of a small, black, comb-like object on the desk surface.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The Pothos (P3) is in critical condition, exhibiting signs of severe etiolation and nutrient deficiency. The other pots are effectively dead zones. The environment lacks the necessary light intensity for these species to thrive.
anomalies: Black comb-like object in CURRENT (New Introduction)
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. Only one specimen (Pothos) remains, and it is struggling significantly. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at intervention, but the lack of light and proper care has led to the systemic loss of the other three registered plants. The recent appearance of a small, black, comb-like object suggests human activity in the immediate vicinity of the desk.
